item.title: Trying to get my coworker's attention. Side of memes
item.description:
Seriously. Trying to get it sent before lunch. You know I can see your workstation from the corridor, right?
My favorite board wipe. Might as well say „Six damage or scoop.“
Even horse apples are superior...
Silver Sharpie Vigilante, freeing us from the scourge of unnecessary marketing. We salute you.
????
I friggin' love Nashville.
My CPU is a neural-net processor; a learning computer. The more contact I have with humans, the more I learn.
item.dc:creator: 4chanrefugee

item.title: Images of Note: Fragment shader
item.description:
That's one way of dealing with things.
This is basically what Arch Linux is.
"Wait, I'm uncool" then I remember I post daily meme dumps.
Open Source Software: It's your friend.
That's a good philosophy
shikanoko nokonoko koshitantan
:3
owo ktibby
Republicans don't care about breaking shit, they only care if the protests are against them.
Y A I N T
yeah basically
IF YOU KNOW YOU KNOW
technically "tar --help" is a valid command.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It is the year 3000, there are no new ideas. The only way to create new media is to mashup characters and stories from the past. These are those stories... Pt 6
item.description: If you know the source share it and I'll try to tag it, thanks! Part 6 https://imgur.com/gallery/XIrrd7C Part 5 https://imgur.com/gallery/L4Lauwg Part 4 https://imgur.com/gallery/5ztCtrI Part 3 https://imgur.com/gallery/UqvWOnP Part 2 https://imgur.com/gallery/eqRL2yC Part 1 https://imgur.com/gallery/FSTNs0s

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
finally
there was an effort
best day of that customer's life
would be nuts
mmm hmm
it's that episode where dwight is being weird
i mean, i guess
looks like he missed and stabbed a tree
as is tradition
i wonder if they pronounce it vase or vase
it looks like a pretty casual wedding
absolute gold response
i guess
ya ain't cool unless you pee your pants
no need to brag
that's you guys
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Wholesome fun with strangers. Be kind to others.
item.description: So awesome that these people took just a little time out of their day to make an incredible experience for this couple. I hope this makes someone else smile today. **Edit** wow! Was working so late I didn’t even see this went Most Viral. I’m really glad so many others enjoyed this as much as I did. Hope everyone had a great day :)

item.title: Shamelessly stolen dump of Doggos and cats
item.description:
I steal memes
Like I just ripped off these individually posted swinging dogs from under sub just the other day
Like why make multiple posts when dumps are better
More bang for your buck.
Plus the lack of pixels?
Now here is a bit better stolen merch, but still busted with no sound.
Now the real premium stuff. You can hear every nail tap of that husky snitch. Snitches get itches behind the ears, he'll learn.
Is this post mature now?
Be kind. Rewind.
It's not the worst scoring, at least you can still here the real sound
He halped
That donkey absolutely destroyed that rubber rooster. I wonder if there is a funnier way of saying that.
Scaredy cat.
Faka sayer gonn hate
Cat's got you tongue.
Too true.
"Do you fucking mind!"
Stolen compilation in a stolen compilation, we are going meta people! ("meta" not "Meta" screw Facebook)
Onlriginal caption was something like "saw bird for first time"
The Crate Escape!
I've known too many human couples like this.
Do NOT unmute
This is a bird and does not belong in a cat & dogs dump. I was back and forth on adding it.
This is also not real cats & dogs. But parallel enough.
Medical support dog. Doesn't allow you out of bed until you've had your 8 hours of sleep.
Part 1
Poor kitty.
THERE IS NO ESCAPE!
"Who are you calling Chicken?"
*slap*
Two types of dogs.
Dog whistle.
Who wore it better? A or
B?
Carrot eating Doggos.
item.dc:creator: SteveTheEgg

item.title: Help someone learn who wants to
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Good morning everybjody! I made it for the 253st eromeme album. On Mjonday and on time and everything!
item.description:
Yeah so. Shit has been hectic as I prepare for Part II...or maybe Part III?....Part IX? of my journey through life! Next Mjonday I may have to post super early because of the new job shenanigans. Hopefully it doesn't stop me from posting completely.
Qcuaclk!
Ok.
The reason I started posting these in the first place was for fun. I had someone I wanted to share them with, plain and simple. Then I kinda got caught up in enjoying it and thought it would be nice to normalize the horny. I hear some of you saying, "Icouri, you're off your nut. You're so far off the other way it's abnormal. You're a mongrel perv!" To which I say....Yes! Mostly. Truthfully, I just like the laughs and the nudge nudge wink wink of it all, which is way I seem off the deep end. Really though, the scale has been tipped to puritanical for centuries. Going hard the way of the perv just pulls the average closer to normalcy. That's just math. Sex is normal, though. It is normal, and it is fun, and all of biology and evolution points to a species' own reproduction. Sex is a biological imperative! And we are one of the few species who are sitting comfortable enough to enjoy it without the reproductive needs. AND we have so much diversity that we get to enjoy a wide array of taste and kinks and preference. So don't be afraid to share a few of these, and don't be afraid to talk to people about sex. That means partners, doctors, or your kids when the time comes (the sex tall *needs* to happen. Keep it age appropriate, but teach them it's normal!). Anyway. Here's the link to the archive, May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri
